_note: Stage 8.6.1 — staff WhatsApp allowlist for /staff/ask-luna endpoint. staff_whatsapp_enabled=true enables WhatsApp phone-based auth for the endpoint. In production, flip this to true only after n8n staff-WhatsApp route is wired (Stage 8.6.3+). Numbers in staff_numbers are STAGING TEST NUMBERS ONLY — do not put real staff phone numbers here until Stage 8.6.4 live-gated-send is approved.
